description_long: This is a modern claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a dual-material handle. The head is composed of a rounded striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is primarily yellow with a black, ergonomic grip that appears to be rubberized for comfort and slip resistance. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, suggesting a sturdy construction suitable for heavy-duty use. The hammer's overall design is streamlined, with no visible signs of wear or damage, and it appears well-balanced for effective use in construction or repair tasks. There is a small rectangular marking on the handle, but no clear brand or logo is discernible.
description: A modern claw hammer with a metallic head and a yellow-and-black ergonomic handle, featuring a curved claw for nail removal and a rubberized grip for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and rounded striking face, as well as the yellow and black ergonomic handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the width of the striking face and the handle's grip, with the claw partially visible behind the head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the handle's curvature and the full profile of the claw, with the striking face on the far side.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the head, clearly showing the split claw and the transition to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip with a slight curve, yellow core, and black textured surface for enhanced grip and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a rounded striking face and a curved, split claw for nail removal, made of metallic steel.
